$comment: Ownership gate for the yta runner (src/run.py). Only entries with owner_confirmed=true are processed. The dub flow pulls from source_url, so ONLY list content you own — re-dubbing third-party videos is still copyright infringement (Content ID matches the visuals regardless of audio language). Schema per entry: id, owner_confirmed, source_type ('youtube'|'upload'), source_url (YouTube watch URL, or a Firebase Storage https URL for uploads), source_language (ISO, e.g. 'hi').

videos.note: DISABLED. Was only a pipeline test; not owned content, so never publish it. Only add owner_confirmed=true entries for videos you create.
Set owner_confirmed=true ONLY for videos you own. Add as many entries as you like.
